channel.title: GitHub QML Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of QML in GitHub

item.title: luisbocanegra/plasma-panel-colorizer
item.description: Latte-Dock and WM status bar customization features for the default KDE Plasma panel

item.title: catsout/wallpaper-engine-kde-plugin
item.description: A kde wallpaper plugin integrating wallpaper engine
